cachegen_size_warning: CacheGen B2 retrieve_size_gb/store_size_gb in raw logs are reconstructed KV MemoryObj sizes after deserialize, not compressed wire bytes.
created_note: Consolidates c_ops main matrix, CacheGen B2 with estimated wire bytes, and LongBench NarrativeQA real-token validation.
paper_interpretation_notes: Our int8 base path transfers about 50% of full KV size, while CacheGen serde microbench estimates about 35% of full KV size on synthetic one-chunk KV.
CacheGen has better compression ratio, but high-reuse TTFT is slower than O1 because serde encode/decode cost can exceed saved transfer time.
O2 medium-reuse benefit comes from layerwise overlap/prefetch, not only byte reduction.
LongBench NarrativeQA real-token validation confirms output-token quality match for B0/O1/O2 at 16K medium reuse.
